page.content: In the analysis of various parameters, the results indicate the following: for Age, the coefficient is 0.113 with a standard error (S.E.) of 0.176, a Wald statistic of 0.410, a significance level (Sig.) of 0.522, an Exp(B) of 1.120, and a 95.0% confidence interval (CI) for Exp(B) ranging from 0.792 to 1.582. For Gender, the coefficient is −0.233, S.E. of 0.201, Wald of 1.349, Sig. of 0.245, Exp(B) of 0.792, and a CI from 0.534 to 1.174. Histological types show a coefficient of 0.201, S.E. of 0.170, Wald of 1.408, Sig. of 0.235, Exp(B) of 1.223, with a CI from 0.877 to 1.706. LNM status has a coefficient of 0.402, S.E.
